destination_namespaces.description: The namespaces (comma separated) to which data will be sent.

destination_topics.description: The topics (comma separated) to which data will be sent.

source_subscription.description: The subscription from which data will be retrieved.

source_topic.description: The topic from which data will be retrieved.

jmespath.description: A JMESPath expression used for querying data.

regexp.description: A regular expression pattern for matching data.

max_tasks.description: Maximum number of concurrent tasks for non-session subscriptions.

session_id_list.description: Explicit list of session IDs to consume. Presence enables session mode.
